segments.description: Dramatic, intense cinematic score with building percussion and synth elements.
Dramatic, high-intensity cinematic music underscored by urgent dialogue and sound effects.
An intense, high-energy rock/metal track with aggressive vocals and heavy instrumentation.
High-energy, aggressive rock/metal track with intense, driving percussion and electric guitar riffs, accompanied by dramatic cinematic sound effects.
High-energy, aggressive rock/metal music with driving percussion and distorted guitars, accompanied by a brief promotional voiceover.

summary: The audio maintains a consistent, high-octane, aggressive rock/metal energy throughout, underscoring intense cinematic action sequences.
